title: cymbachne guineensis
intro: Cymbachne guineensis, also known as Guinea sedge or Guinea grass, is a type of grassy plant native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Cymbachne guineensis include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, its leaves are also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and decoctions.
